subcodes.title: Rugciriku : NDAPERO NKA DIMWE
subcodes.first_line:
## Rugciriku : NDAPERO NKA DIMWE

Oh Karunga wande, Karunga wande! Tjayira vapikoye vakulimburukwa kumaghudona gha ame n
subcodes.notes: Theory: Unique Namibian unity prayer -- appears only in Rugciriku (diu) and Otjiherero (hz) parallel books, section NDAPERO NKA DIMWE (Unity Prayers). Opening: "Oh Karunga wande, Karunga wande! Tjayira vapikoye vakulimburukwa..." No English equivalent found in inventory. May be a locally composed unity prayer or very obscure AB tablet.
